name: Mexican Spoon Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Melted butter, bacon fat, or chicken fat
1 cup Grated Cheddar, Jack, or Mozzarella cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream-style corn, milk, melted butter or fat, and eggs in a large bowl. Blend thoroughly.
2. Stir together the cornmeal, baking soda, and salt until blended, then stir into the liquid mixture, blending well.
3. Pour half the batter into a buttered 9-inch square pan. Spread with grated cheese and onion (if used).
4. Cover with the remaining batter and sprinkle with additional cheese and onion if desired.
5. Bake in a 400°F oven for 45 minutes or until browned and cooked through. Allow to cool slightly before cutting.
